assertions.description: Monorepo root has packages/, apps/, package.json, turbo.json
packages/core/, packages/agents/, apps/api/, apps/client/, apps/web/ exist
Shared types compile: User, Course, Lesson, Agent, StudentContext
All interface fields match reasonable entity definitions
assertions.details: Spec unavailable; used sensible defaults for AI learning platform. Documented in DECISIONS below.

assertions.description: Docker Compose with postgres, redis, minio services
assertions.details: docker not installed but YAML verified to contain all 3 services

assertions.description: Zod schema rejects bad env input
assertions.details: 5 unit tests pass including rejection of missing DATABASE_URL, invalid NODE_ENV, short JWT_SECRET, non-numeric PORT

assertions.description: Husky pre-commit hook exists and is executable
README.md has setup, prerequisites, quickstart sections
turbo.json defines build, lint, test, dev pipelines
At least one unit test passes
assertions.details: 5 tests pass in packages/shared via vitest

decisions: Type definitions: Spec unavailable. Created sensible interfaces for User (id, email, displayName, role, tier, goals), Course (id, title, modules, difficulty, price), Lesson (id, content, type, resources), Agent (id, name, capabilities, modelProvider, systemPrompt), StudentContext (userId, enrolledCourses, quizScores, learningStyle, strengths/weaknesses).
Used Turborepo v2 with tasks (not legacy pipeline key).
Used ESLint flat config (v9) with typescript-eslint.
Added Module and Resource helper interfaces for Course/Lesson completeness.
